BUILD.bazel.content:
"""Per-tenant catalog stamped by `defn bootstrap init` (AIDR-00138)."""

load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file", "tagged_package")

exports_files(glob(["*.cue"]))

filegroup(
    name = "catalog_files",
    srcs = glob(["*.cue"]),
    visibility = ["//kernel/spec:__pkg__"],
)

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = ["bazel-build"],
)

tagged_package(exclude = ["BUILD.bazel"])

gen-infra-bricks.cue.content:
@experiment(aliasv2,explicitopen,shortcircuit,try)

// gen-infra-bricks.cue -- generated by defn gen from AWS catalog.
// DO NOT EDIT. Run: mise run gen
package catalog

import "github.com/defn/other/kernel/schema"

bricks: [string]: schema.#Brick

// infra branch
bricks: "tenant/other/infra": {
	path: "tenant/other/infra"
	slug: "infra"
	kind: "branch"
	reads: []
	writes: []
	desc: "infra instances"
	composes: [
		"tenant/other/infra/.mise/tasks",
		"tenant/other/infra/global",
		"tenant/other/infra/org",
	]
}

bricks: "tenant/other/infra/org": {
	path: "tenant/other/infra/org"
	slug: "infra--org"
	kind: "branch"
	reads: []
	writes: []
	desc: "per-org infrastructure instances"
	composes: []
}

bricks: "tenant/other/infra/global": {
	path: "tenant/other/infra/global"
	slug: "infra--global"
	kind: "component"
	reads: []
	writes: []
	desc:       "cross-account infrastructure"
	implements: "kernel/module/aws-account"
}

BUILD.bazel.content:
load("@io_bazel_rules_go//go:def.bzl", "go_library")
load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file")

go_library(
    name = "app",
    srcs = ["app.go", "modules.go"],
    importpath = "github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/other/go/cmd/other/app",
    visibility = ["//tenant/other/go/cmd/other:__pkg__"],
    deps = [
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/bootstrap",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/build",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/check",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/dispatch",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/gen",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/hatch",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/hello",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/lattice",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/pipeline",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/root",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/stamp",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/sync",
        "//tenant/library/go/cmd/version",
        "//tenant/library/go/lib/cli",
        "//tenant/library/go/lib/config",
        "//tenant/library/go/lib/log",
        "@com_github_spf13_cobra//:cobra",
        "@org_uber_go_fx//:fx",
        "@org_uber_go_fx//fxevent",
        "@org_uber_go_zap//:zap",
    ],
)

fmt_test(name = "build_bazel_fmt", src = "BUILD.bazel", tool = "buildifier")
fmt_test(name = "app_go_fmt", src = "app.go", tool = "gofmt")
fmt_test(name = "modules_go_fmt", src = "modules.go", tool = "gofmt")

tagged_file(name = "build_bazel_tag", src = "BUILD.bazel", tags = ["bazel", "bazel-build"])
tagged_file(name = "app_go_tag", src = "app.go", tags = ["go", "source"])
tagged_file(name = "modules_go_tag", src = "modules.go", tags = ["generated", "go"])

[fmt_test(name = "dispatch_cue_fmt", src = src, tool = "cue") for src in glob(["dispatch.cue"], allow_empty = True)]

[tagged_file(name = "dispatch_cue_tag", src = src, tags = ["cue", "source"]) for src in glob(["dispatch.cue"], allow_empty = True)]

modules.go.content:
// Code generated by defn gen. DO NOT EDIT.
package app

import (
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/bootstrap"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/build"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/check"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/dispatch"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/gen"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/hatch"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/hello"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/lattice"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/pipeline"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/root"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/stamp"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/sync"
	"github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/library/go/cmd/version"
	"go.uber.org/fx"
)

// Modules aggregates all fx.Modules for the application.
var Modules = fx.Options(
	bootstrap.Module,
	build.Module,
	check.Module,
	dispatch.Module,
	gen.Module,
	hatch.Module,
	hello.Module,
	lattice.Module,
	pipeline.Module,
	root.Module,
	stamp.Module,
	sync.Module,
	version.Module,
)

load("@io_bazel_rules_go//go:def.bzl", "go_binary", "go_library")
load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file")

go_library(
    name = "other_lib",
    srcs = ["main.go"],
    importpath = "github.com/defn/other/m/tenant/other/go/cmd/other",
    visibility = ["//visibility:private"],
    deps = ["//tenant/other/go/cmd/other/app"],
)

go_binary(
    name = "other",
    embed = [":other_lib"],
    visibility = ["//visibility:public"],
)

fmt_test(name = "main_go_fmt", src = "main.go", tool = "gofmt")

tagged_file(name = "main_go_tag", src = "main.go", tags = ["go", "source"])

"""Per-tenant spec shards stamped by `defn bootstrap init` (AIDR-00138 D5.2)."""

load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file", "tagged_package")

exports_files(glob(["*.cue"]))

    name = "spec_files",
    srcs = glob(["*.cue"]),
    visibility = ["//kernel/spec:__pkg__"],
)

    tool = "buildifier",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = ["bazel-build"],
)

tagged_package(exclude = ["BUILD.bazel"])
